channel.title: Xiaomi 15 Ultra MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 15 Ultra MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM | 15.0

Size: 9.9 GB

MD5: 9cd5bbab6fd5f8248a7b8c1551f1d8f7

Changelog:
[Alive Design Philosophy]
Alive Design Philosophy unveils fresh, vibrant design across the whole system, making every interaction feel smooth and alive.
All-new Artistic Lock screen:
Artistic Lock screen brings new templates and effects inspired by classic designs, giving your device a cinematic look every time you unlock it.
All-new Gallery:
With AI and reorganized collections, Gallery makes your memories even more vivid.
All-new Weather
Real-time Weather Engine 2.0 shows you the sky and clouds just like in real life – even lets you see rainbows and the Milky Way.
All-new Calendar:
The new Desktop calendar adds a touch of ritual to your day.
All-new Clock:
Updated Clock uses a more refined display structure for a more elegant, easy-to-read look.
Updated animations:
A full-scale animation upgrade makes every interaction flow smoothly and feel stable, responsive, and comfortable.
[Xiaomi HyperCore]
Xiaomi HyperCore, Xiaomi's proprietary core technology platform, enhances performance, graphics, network, and security.
New microarchitecture scheduler:
A new in-house microarchitecture scheduler manages tasks more efficiently.
New dynamic memory:
New technology allows precise resource allocation, so apps start up faster.
Storage 2.0:
Improved file loading for long-term smooth performance.
Upgraded rendering:
Upgraded rendering for multitasking extends battery life.
Heterogeneous computing:
Enhanced rendering pipeline boosts hardware performance for faster, more efficient visuals.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey
item.description:
New Stable Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra Turkey

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS2.0.2.0.VOATRXM | 15.0

Size: 8.3 GB

MD5: fe2bce7b11644284d390745103d23d05

Changelog:
[Alive Design Philosophy]
Alive Design Philosophy unveils fresh, vibrant design across the whole system, making every interaction feel smooth and alive.
All-new Artistic Lock screen:
Artistic Lock screen brings new templates and effects inspired by classic designs, giving your device a cinematic look every time you unlock it.
All-new Gallery:
With AI and reorganized collections, Gallery makes your memories even more vivid.
All-new Weather
Real-time Weather Engine 2.0 shows you the sky and clouds just like in real life – even lets you see rainbows and the Milky Way.
All-new Calendar:
The new Desktop calendar adds a touch of ritual to your day.
All-new Clock:
Updated Clock uses a more refined display structure for a more elegant, easy-to-read look.
Updated animations:
A full-scale animation upgrade makes every interaction flow smoothly and feel stable, responsive, and comfortable.
[Xiaomi HyperCore]
Xiaomi HyperCore, Xiaomi's proprietary core technology platform, enhances performance, graphics, network, and security.
New microarchitecture scheduler:
A new in-house microarchitecture scheduler manages tasks more efficiently.
New dynamic memory:
New technology allows precise resource allocation, so apps start up faster.
Storage 2.0:
Improved file loading for long-term smooth performance.
Upgraded rendering:
Upgraded rendering for multitasking extends battery life.
Heterogeneous computing:
Enhanced rendering pipeline boosts hardware performance for faster, more efficient visuals.

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.8.0.WOACNXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra China
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra China

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.8.0.WOACNXM | 16.0

Size: 12.3 GB

MD5: f3e9cc549ea66e2fa7af29a1f744ddf1

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to January 2026. Increased system security.
[Camera]
New: Using flash while recording videos
New: Switching between front and rear cameras while recording videos

Download: Here

item.title: MIUI OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM Recovery update for Xiaomi 15 Ultra China
item.description:
New Stable Beta Recovery update available!

Device: Xiaomi 15 Ultra China

Codename: xuanyuan

Version: OS3.0.303.0.WOACNXM | 16.0

Size: 10.0 GB

MD5: 719482c5d6b4c45a3a3756a28ff2c41d

Changelog:
[System]
Fix: Zenless Zone Zero couldn't be controlled or crashed in some cases
Fix: Audiobook apps consumed a lot of power during Always-on display standby in some cases
Fix: Background service issues made devices reboot unexpectedly in some cases
Fix: Gallery photos couldn't be shared as PDF via Touch to share
Fix: Volume buttons sometimes used haptic feedback even when it was turned off
Updated the security patch to March 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here

Incremental Update: Here
